Play Rules Credits

Game Guesser!

Character Guesser

In this game mode you will be guessing the character based on an image of that character.

Environment Guesser

In this game mode you will be guessing the game based on an image of the environment.

Soundtrack Guesser

In this game mode you will be guessing the game based on a 10 second snippet of the soundtrack.
